arts.ttl: Serie A Liveblog including Napoli-Roma and Lazio-Bologna
Lazio vs. Bologna: a European six-pointer
arts.sum: Bologna won both last season`s championship matches against Lazio and could achieve three successes in a row against the biancocelesti in Serie A for the first time since the period between 1979 and 1980. Lazio are unbeaten in 10 of their last 11 home games against Bologna in Serie A (W7 D3 L1), however losing the most recent one (1-2 on 18th February), only once have the red-blue achieved two victories in a row away against the Biancocelesti in the tournament: three between 1960 and 1964.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Lazio v Bologna: Match Preview
arts.sum: As Lazio prepare to host Bologna at the Stadio Olimpico this Sunday, the anticipation is palpable for a match that promises to be a thrilling encounter between two teams in excellent form. Both squads are looking to extend their winning streaks in Serie A, adding extra stakes to this pivotal clash. Lazio enter this match riding high on a wave of momentum, having secured four consecutive victories prior to the international break.
